'''Scandium Team''' was a military unit founded by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during its first days.

Under the leadership of [[Dutra Zeneta]]<ref name="Journal 10">{{JournalCite|10|Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)}}</ref> and [[Harovan Toth]],<ref name="Journal 11">{{JournalCite|11|Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)}}</ref> it included another twenty-six agents, among them:
*[[Aven Cholus]], pilot.<ref name="Journal 11" />
*[[Korgath]], infiltrator and former [[Taloron Hunters|Taloron Hunter]].<ref name="Journal 11" />
*[[Opit-Wenbruh]], heavy-weapon specialist and a veteran of the [[Tynquay Skirmishes]].<ref name="Journal 11" />
*[[Jouffer Talamiin]], commander of flight unit.<ref name="Journal 11" />
*Sisters [[Rith Tar'ak]], [[Nyik]] and [[Tor'ara]], experts in desert infiltration.<ref name="Journal 11" />
*Eighteen other unidentified agents.

Scandium Team was based on [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]], traveling on [[Anxarta-class Freighter|Anxarta-class light freighter]] [[Agent/Legends|''Agent'']], but their influence became well-known throughout all the sectors of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Scandium Team was famous because of its' role in both the [[Loac Campaign]] and the [[Vidicx Campaign]] - both of these conflicts were won by the Rebel Alliance, mostly because of the Scandium Team.

The Scandium Team included different units. Probably the most famous one was [[Delta Unit]], which inspired the names of [[Delta Base]] and [[Delta Team]].<ref name="Journal 11" /> [[Unit Theta]] was famous because of its high rate of mortality, and of success. The [[Ebranite]]s in the team, the Ta'rak sisters, founded [[Sandstorm Unit|Sandstorm Team]], specialized in desert infiltration.

==History==
Pilot leader Talamiin was injured during the [[Battle of Gendrah-Narvin]], suffering permanent damaged that left him a handicapped person. He had to retire and Aven Cholus became the new flight leader.

Scandium Team fought on the plains of [[Bresnan]], a planet on [[Wellte-ir system/Legends|Wellte-ir system]]. The battle, later to be known as the [[Wellte-ir Massacre]]: Fifteen members of the Scandium Team were defeated, the survivors being Dutra Zeneta, Harovan Toth, Rith Ta'rak, Aven Cholus, Korgath and Opit-Wenbruh. Cholus rescued the rest of the team from the [[Umber Banks]].<ref name="Journal 11" />

After the Wellte-ir debacle, Scandium Team was dismantled and the few survivors parted looking for different destinations.
